claim: A compact archive card should preserve a decision and the condition under which a discarded rival returns.

active_rivals.prediction: Keeping every note maximizes later recoverability but exceeds the three-card budget.
active_rivals.falsifier: A bounded index recovers omitted material as reliably within the same budget.

active_rivals.prediction: Decision, counterexample, provenance, and return trigger preserve more held-out constraints than a conclusion-only summary.
active_rivals.falsifier: A content-matched prose summary performs equally on held-out cases.
active_rivals.return_if: A content-matched pilot fails to distinguish the formats.

strongest_counterexample: A restart summary can preserve a conclusion while reversing which event caused the correction.
falsifier: Structured envelopes do not improve held-out constraint retention over identical-content prose.
return_if: A new pilot supplies a held-out format comparison.

decision.reason: Use for the pilot, not as a proven superior format.
